promises_sub: To see promises you've made to others, check History
add_trusted_sub: They'll be able to request KX from you
claim_prompt: Got a claim code? Enter it here
no_trusted: No trusted contacts yet. Add them when sending KX.
remove_trust_confirm: Remove {email} from Trusted Contacts? They won't be able to send you requests.
promises_empty_sub: When someone sends you a time-locked payment, it will appear here.
settings_public_key_sub: Advanced — share so others can time-lock KX directly to your key
settings_update_available: A new version of ChronX Wallet is available!
settings_update_go: Go to Check for Updates below to download the latest version.
settings_backup_sub: Export your private key to back up your wallet. Without it, your KX cannot be recovered.
settings_restore_sub: Import a private key to restore a wallet on this device.
settings_cold_sub: Generate an offline wallet for long-term cold storage. The private key is shown once — save it somewhere safe. You can send KX to its address at any time.
settings_claim_emails_sub: If someone sends KX to your email, your wallet detects it automatically. Add up to 3 email addresses. Stored on this device only — never sent to any server.
settings_emails_saved: Emails saved on this device only.
settings_up_to_date: You are running the latest version
settings_pins_no_match: PINs do not match — please try again
